description: Redacted compact live telemetry fixture corpus for Standings, Relative, and Gap To Leader source-selection work. Derived from local raw captures; no telemetry.bin payloads, full session YAML, driver names, user IDs, or team names are included.

states.title: AI practice before usable fastest-lap standings
notes: Standings should wait here because practice/qualifying/test requires a valid lap.

states.title: AI lone qualifying fastest-lap state
notes: Practice/qualifying standings can render because selected scoring rows include valid lap times.
Relative depends on model-v2 timing fallback rather than local proximity in this state.

states.title: AI race pre-green/grid state
notes: AI race state does not have usable local-player context; Standings/Relative/Gap must use focus/timing/scoring arrays.
Relative depends on model-v2 timing fallback rather than local proximity in this state.
Race pre-green may expose grid/scoring before live race gaps are meaningful.

states.title: AI race green with spectated non-player focus
notes: AI race state does not have usable local-player context; Standings/Relative/Gap must use focus/timing/scoring arrays.
Relative depends on model-v2 timing fallback rather than local proximity in this state.

states.title: Open player practice with spectated non-player focus
notes: Practice/qualifying standings can render because selected scoring rows include valid lap times.
Relative depends on model-v2 timing fallback rather than local proximity in this state.

states.title: Open player practice with player focus
notes: Standings should wait here because practice/qualifying/test requires a valid lap.

missingTargets.title: AI race green with player focus
Degraded state with missing focus car
